query: Kairos complaints OR frustrating OR broken

results.title: Positive Feedback and small issues regarding Kairos. - Total War: WARHAMMER
results.content:
I still remember how bad Kairos was as a lord, with his less-than-fun spell selection, or how lackluster the rest of his faction was in regards to spellcasting, how awful the items were you'd get, and how easily desintegrated the demonic units were - and the terrible replenishment of course! Now all of that is fixed, all the heros are great, and the characters with Kairos at the top are fun to play and super powerful at the same time.

That being said, I still noticed a few minor issues, just in case you ever find time for some further polish: [...] 8 months ago

Oct 14, 2025, 5:49:08 PM

I really just wanted to voice my appreciation for the current state of Kairos as a lord, as a faction, and by extension for the continuous (and much needed!) improvements the game has seen over time. Having voiced criticism and complaints in the past, I can now say that it is a real pleasure to play a Tzeentch campaign, so much so that I even shy away from starting other campaigns because I'd miss things I've gotten used to playing as Kairos, though I like other factions as well. [...] There's \a lot\ of technologies in the research tree that are just plain terrible. 10 armor for already heavily armored units? That's hardly anything at all. +50% income from raiding? You don't raid as Kairos, \ever\. There's a lot of recruit ranks that I care nothing for. Basically 50% of the tech tree does nothing at all for me. And I complete the entire tech tree 50% into my campaign or faster. This could really use a bit of work.

results.title: Trying Out Kairos | tyzbit.blog
results.content:
1. No Longhorn support. This is actually being added right now in this issue. So if Kairos doesn't work out, maybe by the time I'm done testing I can fall back to Talos.
2. I (and some apps I run like Home Assistant) are not ready to run such a pared-down OS. Home Assistant supports Bluetooth adapters and I've had two plugged into different nodes in my cluster for a while but it requires specific setup such as using dbus-broker. I anticipate this and other issues will cause me some frustration.

results.title: ‘Kairos’ by Jenny Erpenbeck (Review) – Tony's Reading List
results.content:
One of the more infuriating features of Kairos for many readers will undoubtedly be the power imbalance in the relationship at the core of the novel.  While Erpenbeck does her best to make nineteen-year-old Katharina’s passion for a married man in his mid-fifties believable, it won’t just be the young woman’s friends advising her to look elsewhere.  Cleverly, the writer muddies the waters of their affair, suggesting an environment where fidelity is not as black-and-white as you might expect, hinting at the looseness of ties, and the tendency for young and old alike to go elsewhere when their love lives go through a lull. [...] As horrible as it can be to read, Kairos is a powerful story, depicting a charming (if unusual) relationship deteriorating into a twisted ordeal.  The lightness of Erpenbeck’s touch in her sentences contrasts nicely with the darkness of the emotional blackmail, the gaslighting, even, that Hans carries out.  A writer himself, Hans is able to use his mastery of language and ideas to convince Katharina that his demands are just, and that she owes it to him to follow his every command:

Wenn du mir gegenüber nicht bis auf den Grund deiner Seele ehrlich bist, hat unsere Liebe nicht die geringste Chance.p.216 (Penguin Verlag, 2021)

If you’re not honest with me, to the very depths of your soul, our love doesn’t stand the slightest chance. \\\  
(\\\ my translation) [...] However, the relationship at the heart of the novel is deliberately dark and upsetting.  There are early hints of Hans’ controlling nature and his masochistic side, with the older man certainly not backwards in suggesting what he wants from his young lover.  He introduces her to pornographic photos and riding crops as his controlling tendency comes ever more to the fore.  Katharina is obsessed with Hans and finds herself unable to break away, which is not to say that she’s an unwilling participant in her partner’s games.  It’s more that no matter what she does to please him, she can never truly live up to what he expects from her – complete physical and mental submission.

results.title: News Archive - Kairos Services Inc.
results.content:
public transportation can be very difficult. 3. Negative thoughts and feelings – notably more than before the event. Lacking positive emotions, guilt, feeling sad or numb, and losing interest in people or activities that were previously enjoyed. 4. Feeling on edge – which makes it hard to relax and can lead to hyperarousal, anger and irritability. May manifest through unhealthy actions like abusing alcohol or aggressive driving. We’ll discuss diagnosis, treatment and how symptoms act as barriers in the next post. [...] Likewise, OFCCP will continue its compliance reviews, focused reviews, and complaint investigations, but in lieu of physical onsites, OFCCP will maximize use of every alternative resource available, such as WebEx, Skype, and phones to conduct interviews and complete our evaluations.

If contractors are experiencing difficulty in having their employees accessible during a review or experiencing any other challenges related to the health crisis, OFCCP will remain flexible by coordinating with them and providing reasonable extensions where needed.  Contractors and complainants should reach out to their local OFCCP point of contact to check the status of open evaluations and investigations. [...] I have felt FEAR…pure unadulterated fear. I remember it like it was yesterday as we received indirect fire on Haditha Dam in Iraq. It was without question the only time I felt fear like that in Afghanistan or Iraq. Although over in a moment, I still remember the bone chilling feeling of that night. A deployment later, I felt the impact of TRAUMA as I watched mortars fall around me from a rooftop instead of seeking shelter as my base came under attack. I didn’t feel fear…I didn’t feel anything. PTSD (post-traumatic stress disorder) is mental health problem that some people develop after experiencing or witnessing a life-threatening event, like combat, a natural disaster, a car accident, or sexual assault. It’s normal to have upsetting memories, feel on edge, or have trouble sleeping after

results.title: Any experience with kairos living? : r/AthensHousing - Reddit
results.content:
Painting and Drywall was $740 charge, they had numerous water damage issues that were noted in move in report so they were going to have to paint and patch anyway, plus what they noted was really minor. Carpet cleaning $325, again we noted stains and damaged carpet on move in and they never addressed it. Ice machine never worked, noted in move in report, no action ever taken, we just gave up on that one. Boys ran over a downspout on guttering and they hit me for $150. Some miscellaneous stuff for $265, like toilet seat replacments, three boys in college what do you expect after a year, also hit me on weather stripping around doors, again it was noted in move in report. Total was $1,805. Really disappointed given this is clearly a college area and they are taking advantage of us parents. [...] ExcitementUnable2247

•3y ago

They are TERRIBLE! Run if it’s not too late. Don’t worry you’re not alone , we were stuck in the lease for a year bc we didn’t want to be charged for breaking the lease but they STILL charged us $1500 for painting fees and other damages when we cleaned up the house before we left and repainted too and did a damn good job ! They will just charge money no matter how hard you try , you can’t win with this company they’re slumlords!! They’ll charge you for any and everything they can make up.
